name: summer_get_console
description:
Read recent messages from the editor's Output panel.

Output is post-processed for token economy: consecutive identical messages collapse into one entry with a "(×N)" count suffix, and the response carries a "_filter" summary so you can see what was hidden. Use errors_only=true (default) to drop info/std noise; use raw=true to bypass all shaping.

Use after summer_get_diagnostics indicates console issues.

max_lines.description: Max lines to return after dedupe (default 100)

filter.description: Only return lines containing this string

type.description: Filter by message type at the engine level

errors_only.description: Drop info/std noise, keep errors and warnings (default true)

strict_errors.description: Drop warnings too — return errors only

raw.description: Bypass dedupe and level filtering — return engine output verbatim
